title: Blitz Vanilla
description: Turbocharge your Minecraft experience with a blazingly fast and beautiful modpack. Blitz Vanilla improves your experience with a few packs, but doesn't stray far from the original.
body:
![The Blitz Vanilla banner.](https://i.imgur.com/6qUwoEg.png)

[![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/built-with/fabulously-optimized_64h.png)](https://download.fo)

## What is Blitz?

Blitz is a Minecraft client-side modpack focusing on speed and beauty. Because it's a fork of Fabulously Optimized, you can enjoy huge FPS increases over regular Minecraft. Blitz also includes many mods that make the game more immersive, including Ambient Sounds, Visuality, and Sound Physics Remastered. There are three Blitz "styles" - these include Vanilla, Element, and Fantasy. Note that for now, Element and Fantasy are in development.

## Blitz Vanilla

This is Blitz Vanilla, the Blitz style that tries to improve the Vanilla feel while not modifying it at all. It includes the following packs:

- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by FreshLX
- [xali's Enhanced Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enhanced-vanilla) by xalixilax
- [xali's Enchanted Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enchanted-books) by xalixilax
- [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) by EminGT and team

## Included Mods

Blitz includes everything in Fabulously Optimized, plus:

- [Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) by creativemd
- [Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust) by LizIsTired
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) by randommcsomethin and team
- [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop) by Tschipcraft
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) by Sollace
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) by PinkGoosik
- [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain) by PigCart
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) by henkelmax
- [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) by Superkat32


<details>
<summary>Library mods required for the above to function</summary>

- [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) by creativemd

</details>
